text: 15. COMMENCEMENT AND COMPLETION OF THE WORK: Time  is  of  the  essence  of  this  subcontract.  Subcontractor agrees to supply materials, labor and equipment as necessary to commence his sublet work when directed by Contractor. He shall diligently  pursue  the  completion  of  his  sublet  work  and  coordinate  his  sublet  work  with  that  being  done  on  the  project  by Contractor and other trades so that his sublet work and the work of others shall not be delayed or impaired by any act or omission of an act by Subcontractor. Contractor shall have the right to decide the time and order in which the various portions of the work shall be undertaken or completed or the priority of the work of other subcontractors, and, in general, all matters representing the timely and orderly conduct of the sublet work of Subcontractor on the premises. Contractor may prepare a coordinated progress schedule, and if he does so, Subcontractor shall be required to perform his work in accordance with such schedule, and it may be modified  by  Contractor  as  work  progresses  and  Contractor  shall  have  no  liability  for  damages,  including,  but  not  limited  to overhead, extra costs, or increases in prices arising out of changes in the schedule. If the Subcontractor fails to timely perform its work in accordance with the current progress schedule of the Contractor, Subcontractor shall be liable to the Contractor for all damages occasioned by such failure, including but not limited to any liquidated damages for delay provided for in the Prime Contract.  Further,  in  such  event,  Contractor  may  immediately  terminate  this  agreement.  Contractor  shall  not  be  liable  to  the Subcontractor for any claims, including but not limited to damages, increased costs, or an increase in the contract sum as the result of any delay to the Subcontractor's work resulting from the act, negligence or default of the Owner or the Project Architect
